column1: # Curated fine-grained place names — spots the region->name table (area_names.tsv)
# is too coarse on or misses entirely. Factual OSRS geography, authored for this
# plugin from known coordinates; no runtime fetch, no dependency.
# plane-agnostic). First match wins — keep most-specific rows first, and keep this
# file modest so hub review stays easy.
